//: Core immutable highest precedence → Org → Project → Custom layers → User lowest. Custom layers load in the exact order listed.

core.description: Universal safety and behavioral rules (never modify)

project.description: Project-specific rules (also serves as team layer)

user.description: Personal preferences and role-based settings (cannot weaken rules)

_example_legal.description: Example: legal/compliance team rules (delete this example, add your own)

precedence_note: Core (immutable, always highest) → Org → Project → custom layers in listed order → User (lowest). If any conflict, the stricter rule wins.
//ai_tools: List the per-developer AI tools used in this project. Microsoft Copilot scenarios (M365 Copilot, Copilot Chat, Power Platform Copilot) are admin-enforced via Purview DLP and Entra — they govern at the tenant layer, not via this config. See adapters/microsoft-copilot/canonical-reference-table.md.
